News Sentry

News Sentry 新闻哨兵 is a public global-news reader for Chinese readers.
It organizes ready-to-read stories by regions, issues, related entities, sources, and Breaking News scoring signals.

Primary public routes:
- /public-app
- /api/v1/public/news
- /api/v1/regions
- /api/v1/public/facets
- /public-app/events/{event_id}?target_id={target_id}
- /sitemap.xml
